title: Hasselt, Limburg — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Hasselt, Limburg: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Hasselt is a city in Limburg with a population of 78,000. The capital of Belgian Limburg, known for its fashion museum, Japanese garden, and vibrant Jenever (gin) distilling tradition.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
